prompt: In lodash.js, the internal function baseFlatten uses a default predicate to decide whether a value should be flattened. What is that predicate function called? Also name at least three public functions that call baseFlatten internally.
notes: Large-file orientation: lodash.js is a single 17,259-line file. Ground truth: predicate defaults to isFlattenable (L2984); callers include flatten, flattenDeep, flattenDepth, flatMap(Deep/Depth), concat, union/difference families.
